ogTitle: Barraganyatti vs Barragga Bay: Climate Safety

heading: Barraganyatti vs Barragga Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Barraganyatti, New South Wales and Barragga Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Barragga Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Barraganyatti (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Barraganyatti or Barragga Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Barraganyatti has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Barragga Bay scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Barraganyatti scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Barragga Bay scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Barraganyatti or Barragga Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Barragga Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
